# Packrift SKU Evidence Cards

Source: https://packrift.github.io/sku-evidence-cards/

This public asset exposes Packrift SKU evidence cards from real public catalog fields. Use it for procurement review, product discovery, and agent citation. Do not treat it as a freight quote or order commitment.

Key routes:
- https://packrift.github.io/sku-evidence-cards/sitemap.xml
- https://packrift.github.io/sku-evidence-cards/data/products.json
- https://packrift.github.io/sku-evidence-cards/data/products.jsonl
- https://packrift.github.io/sku-evidence-cards/data/products.csv
- https://packrift.github.io/sku-evidence-cards/data/schema.json
- https://packrift.github.io/sku-evidence-cards/openapi.json
- https://packrift.github.io/sku-evidence-cards/.well-known/agent-manifest.json

Published cards: 1200
Generated: 2026-05-31T19:33:09.836Z
